context.decision_reason: Priority tier: features. CODE_QUALITY_AUDIT just completed with 16 real findings (3 high, 8 medium, 5 low). All 10 prior tasks are completed (status:completed). No pending tasks in active/. Feature coverage is 59% (below 90% gate for SWITCH_PROJECT). SECURITY_AUDIT has not run. Routing to TASK_SYNTHESIZER to create worker tasks from code_quality_audit_output.json findings. High-priority items include: (1) estimateFee Promise reject callback discarded — silent hang on errors; (2) getActiveKeyset() throws plain Error bypassing typed CashuError chain — causes unstructured 500; (3) non-null assertion in signOutputs() relying on implicit call-order coupling. These are real code correctness and production reliability issues.
context.what_you_learned: CODE_QUALITY_AUDIT returned 16 findings despite being logged as 'unproductive (findings=0, tasks=0)' in routing history — the metadata counter is incorrect but the actual output file has real findings. All prior tasks verified (9 VERIFIED, 1 PARTIAL for LND estimateFee). Feature audit shows 59% coverage — SWITCH_PROJECT gate requires 90%. SECURITY_AUDIT output file does not exist and must run before project can switch. The 3 HIGH findings in CODE_QUALITY_AUDIT are actionable and fixable in one worker cycle.
